jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Awfis - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!
